app_description: AI song cover system based on RVC v2

ui.cover_usage:
**One-click AI Cover**: upload a song → separate vocals → convert the voice → mix the accompaniment → export the cover

**Steps:**
1. Download a character model first (open "Download Character Model" below)
2. Upload a song file (MP3/WAV/FLAC)
3. Choose a downloaded character
4. Adjust parameters and click "Start Cover"

> ⚠️ First launch downloads the Mel-Band Roformer vocal separation model automatically (about 200 MB). Please wait patiently.
ui.character_choice_info: The list shows version tags, character ownership, and model source. In versions, epochs means training epochs, while 40k/48k means sample rate.
ui.download_character_info: The list shows version tags, character ownership, and source repositories so you can distinguish different models for the same character.
ui.positive_pitch_info: Positive raises pitch, negative lowers it

conversion.pitch_shift_info: Positive raises pitch, negative lowers it. Male to female often uses +12; female to male often uses -12
conversion.index_rate_info: Higher values sound closer to the training voice, but may reduce clarity
conversion.rms_mix_rate_info: Closer to 1 uses more of the output loudness envelope
conversion.protect_info: Protects consonants and breath sounds; 0.5 means no protection

cover.cover_description: Upload a song, choose a character, and generate an AI cover. The pipeline separates vocals, converts the voice, and mixes the accompaniment automatically.
cover.index_rate_info: Recommended: 30-45%; too low sounds more synthetic, too high may blur articulation
cover.speaker_id_info: Single-character models usually use 0; try other IDs for multi-speaker models
cover.mix_preset_info: Apply a mix profile suitable for most songs
cover.rms_mix_rate_info: Moderately follows the original vocal loudness contour; recommended: 10-30%
cover.backing_mix_info: Blend a small amount of original lead vocal to restore thickness and articulation; too high leaks the source timbre
cover.karaoke_separation_info: Separate lead and backing vocals, convert only the lead, and preserve original harmonies. Useful for songs with backing vocals
cover.karaoke_merge_backing_info: Mix separated original backing vocals back into the accompaniment. Enabled by default to preserve harmony layers
cover.vc_preprocess_mode_info: Strictly uses RoFormer De-Reverb SOTA; if unavailable, processing stops instead of degrading
cover.source_constraint_mode_info: Auto (recommended) enables this only for strict RoFormer De-Reverb preprocessing; if unavailable, processing stops instead of degrading
cover.vc_preprocess_status_info: Shows the actual route this machine will use in auto mode
cover.vc_pipeline_mode_info: Current implementation keeps this project's existing path; official mode calls the bundled official RVC directly and skips custom VC pre/post-processing
cover.singing_repair_info: For high-note dropouts, tearing, metallic artifacts, and sibilance. When enabled, this exits strict 1:1 mode and uses the official-compatible repair path (FP32 + hybrid F0 + F0 stabilization/rate limiting)

models.base_models_desc: These models are required to run RVC and must be downloaded before first use.
models.voice_models_desc: Put .pth model files into assets/weights/, then refresh the model list.
models.mature_deecho_models_desc: Current covers strictly use RoFormer De-Reverb SOTA; if unavailable, processing stops instead of degrading to older models or algorithm chains.

settings.language_saved_restart: ✅ Interface language saved: {language}. Please restart the app for it to take effect.
settings.language_restart_info: The language choice is saved to the config file. Because Gradio builds UI labels at startup, restart the app to apply it.
settings.settings_saved_restart: ✅ Settings saved. Restart the app for changes to take effect.
settings.about_body:
**RVC AI Cover System**

- Built on RVC v2 + Mel-Band Roformer
- Uses RMVPE for high-quality F0 extraction
- Supports CUDA GPU acceleration

[GitHub](https://github.com/RVC-Project/Retrieval-based-Voice-Conversion-WebUI)
settings.model_sources:
### 📥 Character Model Sources

These are the Hugging Face repositories used by the built-in character model list. You can also download models manually and place them under `assets/weights/characters/<character_name>/`:

**Love Live! Series**
- [trioskosmos/rvc_models](https://huggingface.co/trioskosmos/rvc_models) — μ's / Aqours / Nijigasaki / Liella! characters
- [Icchan/LoveLive](https://huggingface.co/Icchan/LoveLive) — Chika, Riko, Eli, You
- [0xMifune/LoveLive](https://huggingface.co/0xMifune/LoveLive) — Nijigasaki / Liella! / Hasunosora
- [Swordsmagus/Love-Live-RVC](https://huggingface.co/Swordsmagus/Love-Live-RVC) — Hanamaru, Setsuna, Kotori, A-RISE, and more
- [Zurakichi/RVC](https://huggingface.co/Zurakichi/RVC) — Nico, Kanata, Setsuna, Hanamaru
- [Phos252/RVCmodels](https://huggingface.co/Phos252/RVCmodels) — Shibuya Kanon
- [ChocoKat/Mari_Ohara](https://huggingface.co/ChocoKat/Mari_Ohara) — Mari Ohara
- [HarunaKasuga/YoshikoTsushima](https://huggingface.co/HarunaKasuga/YoshikoTsushima) — Yoshiko Tsushima
- [thebuddyadrian/RVC_Models](https://huggingface.co/thebuddyadrian/RVC_Models) — Kazuno sisters

**Genshin / Honkai / Zenless Zone Zero (HoYoverse)**
- [makiligon/RVC-Models](https://huggingface.co/makiligon/RVC-Models) — Furina, Ayaka, Focalors
- [kohaku12/RVC-MODELS](https://huggingface.co/kohaku12/RVC-MODELS) — Nahida, Herta, Firefly, Tingyun, Hoshimi Miyabi, and more
- [jarari/RVC-v2](https://huggingface.co/jarari/RVC-v2) — Furina (Korean), Silver Wolf (Korean)
- [mrmocciai/genshin-impact](https://huggingface.co/mrmocciai/genshin-impact) — 50+ Genshin characters (manual download)

**VOCALOID**
- [javinfamous/infamous_miku_v2](https://huggingface.co/javinfamous/infamous_miku_v2) — Hatsune Miku (1000 epochs)

**Hololive / VTuber**
- [megaaziib/my-rvc-models-collection](https://huggingface.co/megaaziib/my-rvc-models-collection) — Pekora, Sakura Miko, Subaru, Kobo, Kaela, and more
- [Kit-Lemonfoot/kitlemonfoot_rvc_models](https://huggingface.co/Kit-Lemonfoot/kitlemonfoot_rvc_models) — Hololive JP/EN characters

**THE IDOLM@STER / Uma Musume**
- [trioskosmos/rvc_models](https://huggingface.co/trioskosmos/rvc_models) — Ranko Kanzaki, Riamu Yumemi
- [makiligon/RVC-Models](https://huggingface.co/makiligon/RVC-Models) — Takane Shijou, Rice Shower

**Project SEKAI**
- [kohaku12/RVC-MODELS](https://huggingface.co/kohaku12/RVC-MODELS) — Nene Kusanagi

> 💡 After manual download, put `.pth` and `.index` files under `assets/weights/characters/<character_name>/`, then refresh the list.

messages.download_network_error: An error occurred during download. Please check your network connection.
messages.please_select_character_to_download: Please select a character to download

character_details.downloaded_empty: After you select a downloaded character, this panel shows version ownership, source repository, and local file paths.
character_details.available_empty: After you select a character to download, this panel shows version ownership, source repository, and download source.

route_status.mature_roformer_auto_download_note: The RoFormer model is downloaded automatically by audio-separator on first run into assets/separator_models
route_status.mature_legacy_status_suffix: ← status only; strict SOTA auto mode does not use this
route_status.mature_missing_strict: Strict SOTA DeEcho runtime is currently missing; cover auto mode will stop instead of degrading
route_status.official_route_title: Currently using the bundled official RVC implementation
route_status.official_route_flow: Flow: lead vocal separation → official audio loader / official VC → mix
route_status.official_route_note: Note: skips this project's custom VC preprocessing, source constraint, and silence-gate post-processing
route_status.strict_route_ready_title: ✅ Fixed to strict SOTA RoFormer De-Reverb
route_status.strict_route_flow: Flow: lead vocal separation → RoFormer De-Reverb → RVC → mix
route_status.strict_route_unavailable_title: ⚠️ Strict SOTA RoFormer De-Reverb is selected, but the runtime is unavailable
route_status.strict_route_unavailable_flow: Processing will stop and will not degrade to UVR or algorithmic dereverb
route_status.strict_route_unavailable_advice: Suggestion: repair the audio-separator / RoFormer De-Reverb runtime
route_status.auto_route_ready_title: ✅ Auto mode currently uses strict SOTA RoFormer De-Reverb
route_status.auto_route_missing_title: ⚠️ Auto mode is missing the strict SOTA DeEcho runtime
route_status.auto_route_missing_reason: Reason: no runnable RoFormer De-Reverb condition was detected

device_info.no_gpu_cpu: No GPU detected; CPU will be used
